$comment: Machine-readable variant catalog. Consumed via slidev-theme-tahta/variants.json. Set with themeConfig.variant. `fit` = the tone/audience each variant suits, to drive a deliberate choice.

variants.label: Editorial
variants.fit: Essays, keynotes, thought-leadership — refined and serious. The neutral fallback when unset.
variants.description: Refined serif headlines (Fraunces), hairline rules, faint grain. The default.

variants.label: Brutalist
variants.fit: Engineering, dev-tools, infra, technical deep-dives — raw and confident.
variants.description: Monospace (Space Mono), hard edges, blueprint grid, lime accent.

variants.label: Soft
variants.fit: Product, consumer, onboarding, friendly pitches — warm and approachable.
variants.description: Humanist sans (Plus Jakarta), big radius, soft shadows, coral accent.

variants.label: Minimal
variants.fit: Data, strategy, corporate, finance — Swiss restraint that lets content lead.
variants.description: Swiss — Archivo heavy, maximum whitespace, hairline rules, red accent.

variants.label: Paper
variants.fit: Long-form, narrative, research, retrospectives — humane and unhurried.
variants.description: Warm editorial — rust serif on cream paper, faint grain.

variants.label: Atelier
variants.fit: Design-forward, launches, premium brand talks — polished and expressive.
variants.description: Cool refined dark with gradient display titles, periwinkle accent.

variants.label: Notebook
variants.fit: Teaching, workshops, casual internal updates — informal and hand-made.
variants.description: White ruled paper, navy bold sans, dashed section rules, highlighter callouts.

variants.label: Lagoon
variants.fit: Modern company decks, product, creative — moody, premium, data-rich.
variants.description: Dark teal depths with soft pastel role-colors (pink, sky, cream-yellow, sage), cream text, and rounded cards. Charts graduate through the pastels.

variants.label: Press
variants.fit: Essays, journalism, op-eds, design annuals — taste-forward and literary.
variants.description: Stark black-and-white editorial magazine: high-contrast Fraunces serif, hairline rules, sharp corners, one editorial-red spot.

variants.label: Boardroom
variants.fit: Sales, finance, board reviews, enterprise — trustworthy and data-forward.
variants.description: Deep navy with one warm-orange accent and a clean sans. Conservative, credible; charts in a themed corporate palette.

variants.label: Signal
variants.fit: Launches, demo-day, product reveals — high-energy and modern.
variants.description: True black with one electric cyan accent and a strong glow; heavy tight sans. The one-saturated-accent recipe.

variants.label: Muse
variants.fit: Research, lectures, long-form, retrospectives — intellectual and unhurried.
variants.description: A muted stone ground with cream cards and heavy Fraunces serif; earthy olive accent, faint grain. Restraint as luxury.

variants.label: Poster
variants.fit: Campaigns, sports, events, bold announcements — loud and confident.
variants.description: Cream with oversized Anton condensed headlines, thick hard rules, and one hot red-orange. Athletic poster energy.
